description: Uebermaps was a map service for storing spots on public and private maps. Its website now presents a shutdown notice stating the service ended on 31 July 2023.
summary: uebermaps.com exposes a documented REST API v2 surface via OpenAPI; the site and original API docs now show that the service shut down in July 2023, and no current public CLI, GraphQL API, or MCP server was found.
